event: Target introduction of a bill to the Legislative Council to establish AMLO-based licensing regimes for virtual asset dealing, custodian, advisory, and management services
EnsembleTX pilot phase (tokenised-deposit settlement of tokenised money-market-fund transactions under Project Ensemble) operates throughout the year
HKMA's further preparatory work following the e-HKD Pilot Programme, ahead of any decision on a possible future retail e-HKD, targeted for completion
The two newly-licensed stablecoin issuers (Anchorpoint Financial Limited and HSBC) intend to complete preparation and launch business, per their own business plans
